economic_notes: Commercial fisheries, commercial forestry operations, gas bar, truck stop, high stakes video terminals, energy partnerships (Wocawson Energy LP 51%, Burchill Wind LP 51%), motel, capital construction. Land claim settled in FY2017 with economic development trust managed by third party.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). Auditor report signed March 26, 2024. Net debt position of -$13,039,894. Restricted cash includes CMHC reserves, economic development funds, and FNFA reserve totalling $7,118,026. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: John W. Jamer Ltd., Wocawson Energy LP (51%), Victoria Motel Co. Ltd., Burchill Wind LP (51%), and Tribal ReLeaf (wound down). Seven fully consolidated subsidiaries including Maliseet Gas Bar Ltd., Tobique High Stakes V.T., Tobique Truck Stop, Maliseet Capital Construction, commercial forestry and fisheries operations, and band programs. Remuneration schedule noted as unaudited and values not extracted from provided text. Line of credit with FNFA of $14,012,808 outstanding. Land claim settlement trust of $2,339,388 held by third party. Adopted new PSAB standards prospectively from April 1, 2022.
